system.prerequisite: Techmarine or Mechanicus Implants, Ferric Lure
system.benefit: Pull heavier metal objects from farther
system.description: The character can call an unsecured metal object to his hand as with Ferric Lure. The character may summon objects of up to 2 kilograms per point of Willpower Bonus, and the object may be up to 40 metres distant. The character must spend a Full Action and succeed on a Willpower Test to enact this rite.
